name: Kritika Verma
title: Frontend Developer
tagline: Building clean, responsive web interfaces with React
about: I'm a frontend developer focused on building responsive, component-driven web applications using React and modern JavaScript. I work with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion to create clean, interactive interfaces with attention to layout, structure, and usability.
bio: I enjoy breaking UI problems into reusable components and maintaining clear, readable codebases. My workflow involves iterating on layouts, handling client-side logic, and ensuring consistent behavior across screen sizes. I'm continuously building projects to strengthen my frontend fundamentals and practical development skills.

responsibilities: Built and deployed multiple responsive landing pages using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for live client-facing products.
Implemented reusable UI components and layouts with a focus on responsiveness and cross-browser consistency.
Participated in deployment workflows, including hosting setup and publishing updates to production environments.
Used Git and GitHub for version control, handling feature updates, fixes, and collaborative changes.
Worked with real production setups involving domains and live websites, gaining exposure to end-to-end deployment flow.
Built multiple practice projects while training at QSpiders, focusing on HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React fundamentals.
Practiced responsive layouts, component-based UI design, and client-side logic through hands-on exercises and personal projects.

projects.title: World Tour Map
highlights: Built an interactive map application using React and Leaflet.js to visualize and manage visited locations.
Implemented custom markers, popups, and responsive layouts to support different screen sizes.
Managed client-side state for map interactions and UI updates.

projects.title: Image Generator
highlights: Built a frontend application to generate and display images based on user input.
Focused on handling user interactions, UI state, and dynamic rendering.
Designed a clean, responsive interface with clear feedback during user actions.

projects.title: Admin Dashboard
highlights: Developed a dashboard-style interface with reusable components and structured layouts.
Implemented navigation, cards, and data display components commonly used in admin panels.
Focused on layout consistency, responsiveness, and component reuse.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
highlights: Designed and built a single-page portfolio to showcase projects and experience.
Implemented animations and transitions using Framer Motion.
Structured the project with reusable components and a consistent design system.
